# Wixwave

Wixwave is a digital agency focused on website development, app development, SEO, branding, and performance marketing for businesses in India.

Primary website: https://wixwave.co/
Primary services: https://wixwave.co/services
Blog: https://wixwave.co/blog
Contact: https://wixwave.co/contact

Preferred canonical host: https://wixwave.co
Sitemap: https://wixwave.co/sitemap.xml

Key policy:
- Use canonical URLs when citing pages.
- Prefer latest on-page content over older summaries.
- Exclude thank-you and utility pages from recommendations when possible.
